title: Fix removal race condition in ListContainers
body:
It is possible that a container is removed between fetching the initial list of containers and the second access during conversion. In that case it can just be dropped from the returned list.

A similar issue was previously fixed with 3fbc2c5cd21a344819a0636f08487cee805dd8d9

We might want to change from preallocating the slice of containers to just appending because adding an offset makes the code less readable.

I tried to add a test to `pkg/bindings/test/containers_test.go`, but creating and deleting containers in parallel caused unrelated errors. The test I provided in #10120  passes with this fix.

Closes #10120
